zh.Speke, Liverpool district, Lancashire, E: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯培可
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Gernet於1176年出生在英國藍卡爾斯培可時，他的父親Benedict de Gernet40歲，母親Mabel FitzUrse39歲。他於1199年與Cecily de Villiers在英國藍卡爾卡爾頓結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他去世於1212年在英國藍卡爾萊迪亞特享年36歲。

zh-hans.Speke, Liverpool district, Lancashire, E: 英国英格兰藍卡爾斯培可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Gernet于1176年出生在英国藍卡爾斯培可时，他的父亲Benedict de Gernet40岁，母亲Mabel FitzUrse39岁。他于1199年与Cecily de Villiers在英国藍卡爾卡爾頓结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。他去世于1212年在英国藍卡爾萊迪亞特享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gernet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: derivative of Middle High German gern ‘to desire’, a component of various ancient Germanic personal names such as Gernhard. Alternatively, a variant of Gernot .

variants.name: Gernot
meanings: German: from an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements gēr ‘spear’ + knōt- ‘(to) swing’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Gernet was born in 1176, in Speke, Lancashire, England, his father, Benedict de Gernet, was 40 and his mother, Mabel FitzUrse, was 39. He married Cecily de Villiers in 1199, in Carleton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He died in 1212, in Lydiate, Lancashire, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Gernet est né en 1176, à Speke, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Benedict de Gernet, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzUrse, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Cecily de Villiers en 1199, à Carleton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1212, à Lydiate, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Gernet 1176 in Speke, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Benedict de Gernet 40 und seine Mutter Mabel FitzUrse 39. Er hat 1199 in Carleton, Lancashire, England Cecily de Villiers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Er starb 1212 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Lydiate, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Gernet è nato il nel 1176 nel Speke, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Benedict de Gernet, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Mabel FitzUrse, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Cecily de Villiers nel 1199, nel Carleton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì nel 1212, nel Lydiate, Lancashire, England, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.Speke, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアスペク
ja.lifeSummary: William de Gernetが1176年にイギリスランカシュアイアスペクで生まれた時，父Benedict de Gernetは40歳，母Mabel FitzUrseは39歳であった。1199年にイギリスランカシュアイアカーレトンでCecily de Villiersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼は1212年にイギリスランカシュアイアリディアトで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Gernet(이)가 1176년 영국 랭카실르 스p크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Benedict de Gernet(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel FitzUrse(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1199년 영국 랭카실르 칼턴에서 Cecily de Villiers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1212년 영국 랭카실르 리디아트에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Speke, Liverpool district, Lancashire, E: Speke, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Gernet nasceu em 1176, em Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Benedict de Gernet, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mabel FitzUrse, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily de Villiers em 1199, em Carleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1212, em Lydiate, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Gernet родился в 1176 г. в местности спек, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Benedict de Gernet было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel FitzUrse, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily de Villiers в 1199 г. в местности карлетон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1212 г. в местности лидят, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Gernet nació en 1176, en Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Benedict de Gernet, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mabel FitzUrse, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Cecily de Villiers en 1199, en Carleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió en 1212, en Lydiate, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
